CREATE TABLE LEFT_RIGHT (left Int32, right Int32);
INSERT INTO LEFT_RIGHT VALUES (1, 2), (2, 1), (NULL, 3), (3, NULL), (NULL, NULL);
SELECT left < right AS is_small FROM LEFT_RIGHT;
SELECT left <= right AS is_small FROM LEFT_RIGHT;
SELECT left > right AS is_large FROM LEFT_RIGHT;
SELECT left >= right AS is_large_or_equal FROM LEFT_RIGHT;
SELECT CASE WHEN left < right THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_small FROM LEFT_RIGHT;
SELECT CASE WHEN left IS NULL OR right IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CASE WHEN left < right THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END AS is_small FROM LEFT_RIGHT;
CREATE TABLE LEFT_RIGHT_COMPLEX (left_val Int32, right_val Int32, description String);
INSERT INTO LEFT_RIGHT_COMPLEX VALUES (1, 2, 'one is less'), (2, 1, 'two is greater'), (NULL, 3, 'left is null'), (3, NULL, 'right is null'), (NULL, NULL, 'both are null');
SELECT left_val, right_val, CASE WHEN left_val < right_val THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_small, description FROM LEFT_RIGHT_COMPLEX;
SELECT t1.left_val, t2.right_val, (CASE WHEN t1.left_val < t2.right_val THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_small FROM LEFT_RIGHT_COMPLEX AS t1 JOIN LEFT_RIGHT_COMPLEX AS t2 ON t1.left_val = t2.right_val;

SELECT t1.left_val, t2.right_val, (CASE WHEN t1.left_val < t2.right_val THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_small FROM LEFT_RIGHT_COMPLEX AS t1 CROSS JOIN LEFT_RIGHT_COMPLEX AS t2 WHERE t1.description LIKE '%less%';
